description: ImmoScout24 is a German real-estate marketplace for property search and listing management. Its platform supports property data, search, expose, and related workflows for brokers and real-estate software integrations.
summary: ImmoScout24 exposes a documented REST API authenticated with OAuth 1.0a consumer credentials or a personal access token, plus a public MCP endpoint at https://app.chatgpt.immobilienscout24.de/v2/mcp.
